- [ ] 🎨 Code style update (formatting, renaming)

## Checklist

<!-- Mark completed items with 'x' -->

- [ ] I have signed off my commits with `git commit -s` (DCO)
- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md with my changes
- [ ] I have created/updated relevant ADRs if this introduces architectural changes
- [ ] I have updated values-*.yaml files if this changes configuration
- [ ] I have tested deployment on a fresh cluster (if deployment-related)
